## Description

Describe what this PR changes and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran tests locally (`dotnet test` and, when relevant, client tests)
- [ ] I added/updated tests for behavior changes
- [ ] I updated documentation (`README.md`, `CHANGELOG.md`) if needed
- [ ] I verified no sensitive data is included
